title: Problems With Large Language Models for Learner Modelling: Why LLMs Alone Fall Short for Responsible Tutoring in K--12 Education
authors: Danial Hooshyar, Yeongwook Yang, Gustav Sir, Tommi Karkkainen, Raija Hamalainen, Mutlu Cukurova, Roger Azevedo
zh_abstract: 该研究比较了LLM与深度知识追踪模型在K-12学习者建模中的表现，发现LLM在时序一致性与早期预测稳定性上明显不足。作者建议采用融合显式学习者模型的混合框架，而非仅依赖LLM。

title: An Experience Report on a Pedagogically Controlled Curriculum-Constrained AI Tutor for SE Education
authors: Lucia Happe, Dominik Fuchs, Luca Huttner, Kai Marquardt, Anne Koziolek
zh_abstract: 论文报告了面向中学编程课程的AI导师实践，通过课程约束和知识库结构化控制输出。初步结果显示可提升提问与引导体验，但样本规模和长期效果仍需进一步验证。

title: IntelliCode: A Multi-Agent LLM Tutoring System with Centralized Learner Modeling
zh_abstract: IntelliCode提出集中式可版本化学习者状态，并由多智能体协同执行评估、提示、复习和参与度监测。该设计强调可审计、可解释和长期个性化辅导能力。

title: AI tutoring can safely and effectively support students: An exploratory RCT in UK classrooms
zh_abstract: 在英国中学的探索性随机对照试验中，经过教学微调与教师监管的AI辅导在学习结果上不弱于人工导师。研究也显示AI在苏格拉底式追问上的潜力，但仍依赖教师监督机制。

title: How well do Large Language Models Recognize Instructional Moves? Establishing Baselines for Foundation Models in Educational Discourse
zh_abstract: 该文评估基础模型在真实课堂话语中识别教学行为的能力。结果表明少样本提示能提升表现，但不同教学行为之间仍存在明显识别差异和误报问题。

title: AgentTutor: Empowering Personalized Learning with Multi-Turn Interactive Teaching in Intelligent Education Systems
authors: Yuxin Liu, Zeqing Song, Jiong Lou, Chentao Wu, Jie Li
zh_abstract: AgentTutor面向多轮教学交互，结合学习者画像与多智能体模块实现动态教学策略调整。实验显示在教学质量和持续对话有效性上优于静态单轮问答方案。

title: Large Language Models Approach Expert Pedagogical Quality in Math Tutoring but Differ in Instructional and Linguistic Profiles
zh_abstract: 研究比较人类导师与LLM在数学补救教学中的逐轮反馈，发现LLM在总体教学质量上接近专家。与此同时，其在复述、追问和语言风格上与专家仍存在系统性差异。

title: PICKT: Practical Interlinked Concept Knowledge Tracing for Personalized Learning using Knowledge Map Concept Relations
authors: Wonbeen Lee, Channyoung Lee, Junho Sohn, Hansam Cho
zh_abstract: PICKT通过知识图谱关系融合多源输入以增强知识追踪，重点解决新生和新题冷启动问题。实验表明该方法在真实教学场景下具备更高稳定性与实用性。

title: Developing a General Personal Tutor for Education
zh_abstract: 论文从国家级教育应用视角讨论通用AI导师的设计难题，指出仅靠通用LLM难以满足长期学习目标与可验证教学质量要求。作者强调需补齐学习科学与系统工程之间的空白。

title: LeafTutor: An AI Agent for Programming Assignment Tutoring
authors: Madison Bochard, Tim Conser, Alyssa Duran, Lazaro Martull, Pu Tian, Yalong Wu
zh_abstract: LeafTutor定位于编程作业辅导，提供逐步引导而非一次性答案。实证结果显示其在可扩展性与个性化支持方面具有替代部分助教支持的潜力。

title: Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning based AI tutor for Socratic Interdisciplinary Instruction
authors: Mei Jiang, Haihai Shen, Zhuo Luo, Bingdong Li, Wenjing Hong, Ke Tang, Aimin Zhou
zh_abstract: 该工作将跨学科苏格拉底教学建模为POMDP，并通过进化强化学习缓解奖励稀疏与策略塌缩。框架强调在长程教学目标下的策略多样性与可适配性。

title: Hierarchical Pedagogical Oversight: A Multi-Agent Adversarial Framework for Reliable AI Tutoring
zh_abstract: HPO通过对抗式多智能体辩论实现教学监督，提升数学辅导中对错误推理的识别能力。结果表明小参数模型在该机制下可获得更高可靠性与资源效率。

link: From Pilots to Practices: A Scoping Review of GenAI-Enabled Personalization in Computer Science Education
code: Iman Reihanian, Yunfei Hou, Qingquan Sun
column12: 该综述总结了计算机教育中GenAI个性化实践的有效设计模式，指出“解释优先、分层提示、工件对齐”更有利于学习。论文同时梳理了诚信、公平与过度依赖等风险缓解策略。

title: Toward Trustworthy Difficulty Assessments: Large Language Models as Judges in Programming and Synthetic Tasks
authors: H. M. Shadman Tabib, Jaber Ahmed Deedar
zh_abstract: 研究发现LLM在编程题难度判定上与可解释机器学习模型存在显著差距，并暴露出类别偏置问题。结果提示教育评测场景下需引入更稳健的判别机制与验证流程。

title: When Scaffolding Breaks: Investigating Student Interaction with LLM-Based Writing Support in Real-Time K-12 EFL Classrooms
authors: Junho Myung, Hyunseung Lim, Hana Oh, Hyoungwook Jin, Nayeon Kang, So-Yeon Ahn, Hwajung Hong, Alice Oh, Juho Kim
zh_abstract: 在K-12英语写作课堂真实部署中，LLM脚手架提升了语法层面表现，但也可能削弱低水平学习者动机并增加依赖。研究提出了更包容的课堂集成设计建议。

title: Exploring The Interaction-Outcome Paradox: Seemingly Richer and More Self-Aware Interactions with LLMs May Not Yet Lead to Better Learning
authors: Rahul R. Divekar, Sophia Guerra, Lisette Gonzalez, Natasha Boos
zh_abstract: 论文提出“交互-结果悖论”：LLM提升了学习互动质量与自我表达，但未必稳定转化为更高学习产出。该发现强调教学系统应重点设计可促进有效认知努力的机制。
